requirement_topic.en: IEC 61851 Safety and Caribbean Outdoor Derating
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 61851安全及加勒比户外降额
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 61851安全及加勒比戶外降額

summary.en: Grenada Bureau of Standards (GDBS) is the national standards body. For EV chargers, the practical safety baseline should be IEC 61851-1 for conductive charging systems and IEC 61851-23 for DC EV supply equipment, with IEC 62196 connector evidence where Type 2 / CCS2 is used. Outdoor installations in Grenada require special attention to hurricane exposure, wind-driven rain, salt-mist corrosion, high humidity, surge and lightning protection, UV exposure, enclosure ingress protection, mounting strength, and thermal derating for tropical conditions. GDBS or project specifications may require standards evidence even where a dedicated EVSE regulation is not publicly identified.
summary.zh: 格林纳达标准局（GDBS）是国家标准机构。对于电动汽车充电桩，实务安全基线应为传导充电系统IEC 61851-1、直流EV供电设备IEC 61851-23，以及在采用Type 2 / CCS2时的IEC 62196接口证据。格林纳达户外安装须特别关注飓风暴露、风驱雨、盐雾腐蚀、高湿度、浪涌和雷电保护、紫外暴露、外壳防护等级、安装强度及热带条件下的热降额。即使未公开识别出专门EVSE法规，GDBS或项目规范也可能要求标准证据。
summary.zht: 格瑞那達標準局（GDBS）是國家標準機構。對於電動汽車充電樁，實務安全基線應為傳導充電系統IEC 61851-1、直流EV供電設備IEC 61851-23，以及在採用Type 2 / CCS2時的IEC 62196接口證據。格瑞那達戶外安裝須特別關注颶風暴露、風驅雨、鹽霧腐蝕、高濕度、浪湧和雷電保護、紫外暴露、外殼防護等級、安裝強度及熱帶條件下的熱降額。即使未公開識別出專門EVSE法規，GDBS或項目規範也可能要求標準證據。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61851-1 - Electric vehicle conductive charging system - General requirements
IEC 61851-23 - DC electric vehicle supply equipment
IEC 62196 - Plugs, socket-outlets, vehicle connectors and vehicle inlets
IEC 60529 - Degrees of protection provided by enclosures
IEC 60068 / IEC 61701 style environmental evidence for humidity, corrosion, and salt-mist risk where specified

summary.en: China's comparable baseline is GB/T 18487.1-2023 for conductive charging systems, plus GB/T 20234 connectors and GB/T 27930 for DC communication. This evidence can help engineering review, but it includes China-specific connector and communication assumptions and does not by itself demonstrate IEC 61851, IEC 62196, tropical outdoor, salt-mist, or hurricane-exposure suitability for Grenada.
summary.zh: 中国可比基线为传导充电系统GB/T 18487.1-2023，以及GB/T 20234接口和直流通信GB/T 27930。该证据可支持工程审查，但包含中国特有接口和通信假设，不能单独证明符合格林纳达所需的IEC 61851、IEC 62196、热带户外、盐雾或飓风暴露适用性。
summary.zht: 中國可比基線為傳導充電系統GB/T 18487.1-2023，以及GB/T 20234接口和直流通訊GB/T 27930。該證據可支持工程審查，但包含中國特有接口和通訊假設，不能單獨證明符合格瑞那達所需的IEC 61851、IEC 62196、熱帶戶外、鹽霧或颶風暴露適用性。

gap.en: Exporters should prepare an IEC 61851 clause matrix, accredited IEC safety reports, IEC 62196 connector reports, enclosure IP and corrosion evidence, surge and lightning protection design, coastal salt-mist materials review, mounting and anchoring instructions for hurricane-prone sites, and tropical thermal derating data. A GB/T 18487 report is only a starting point and should not be presented as direct Grenada IEC compliance evidence.
gap.zh: 出口商应准备IEC 61851逐条矩阵、认可IEC安全报告、IEC 62196接口报告、外壳IP和腐蚀证据、浪涌和雷电保护设计、沿海盐雾材料审查、适用于飓风易发场址的安装和锚固说明，以及热带热降额数据。GB/T 18487报告仅是起点，不应作为格林纳达IEC合规的直接证据提交。
gap.zht: 出口商應準備IEC 61851逐條矩陣、認可IEC安全報告、IEC 62196接口報告、外殼IP和腐蝕證據、浪湧和雷電保護設計、沿海鹽霧材料審查、適用於颶風易發場址的安裝和錨固說明，以及熱帶熱降額數據。GB/T 18487報告僅是起點，不應作為格瑞那達IEC合規的直接證據提交。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional to mandatory by project specification, GDBS standards adoption, utility/site-owner requirements, and electrical-installation approval; IEC safety evidence should be treated as required for credible EVSE deployment
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 18487 applies to China domestic design and is not accepted as direct IEC 61851 evidence without clause-level gap assessment and additional testing

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Grenada-facing EVSE documentation should include IEC 61851 and IEC 62196 evidence plus outdoor tropical, hurricane, surge, humidity, and salt-mist suitability. China GB/T 18487 evidence is not a direct substitute.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向格林纳达的EVSE文件应包括IEC 61851和IEC 62196证据，并证明适用于热带户外、飓风、浪涌、湿度和盐雾条件。中国GB/T 18487证据不能直接替代。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向格瑞那達的EVSE文件應包括IEC 61851和IEC 62196證據，並證明適用於熱帶戶外、颶風、浪湧、濕度和鹽霧條件。中國GB/T 18487證據不能直接替代。
